rulings.Case Title: MORPHOS GALLERY, INC., DBA CATHARINE CLARK ET AL VS. DAVID A. KLEIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 1, 2025. Line 1. DEFENDANT BRIAN GROSS , AN INDIVIDUAL, BRIAN GROSS FINE ART, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees in the amount of $50,835.00 and Costs of $1,555.60 for a total of $52,390.60 is GRANTED. The Court finds the amount of time expended as supported by the itemization is reasonable, the billing rate is reasonable for services provided, and the costs were reasonably incurred. Plaintiff's request that the court order Gross Gallery to provide further evidence is denied. The Court will prepare its own order addressing the motion. =(501/MEW) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. MOTOYOSHI KOMORI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 1, 2025. Line 3. DEFENDANT MOTOYOSHI KOMORI DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. The complaint states a cause of action or unlawful detainer. The operative notice complies with the requirements of CCP 1161(3) and the proof of service for the notices complies with CCP 1162(a)(3). =(501/MEW) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 1, 2025. Line 4.2. DEFENDANT VIOLA CHOI Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Subject to opposition, the motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff must serve complete verified response without objections to (1) Form Interrogatories - General, (2) Form Interrogatories - Unlawful Detainer, and (3) Requests for Production of Documents within five days of notice of entry or Order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $499.50. =(501/MEW) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
